{{Quote|Skinny ''v'lch''. Not find husband, all skinny. Morrts can't live on skinny. Feed you. Make you ''Gweek''. Good husband; two tuskers; nine morrts.|Captain Ugmush suggests making [[Callista Ming]] into a proper Gamorrean sow|<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>}}
'''Ugmush''' was the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]<ref name="MS" /> of the [[Subla Ransom]] [[Subla Ransom Medium Cargo Hauler|Medium Cargo Hauler]] ''[[Zicreex]]'' and had three husbands. She often presented herself in a garish combination of off-world clothes, with [[Eye/Legends|eye]]-paint and [[Diamond/Legends|diamond]] [[Nose/Legends|nose]]-rings. Her long [[Hair/Legends|hair]] was [[Hair dye|dyed]] pink and her heavily-muscled arms and [[Breast/Legends|breasts]] were covered by fifteen [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] [[morrt]]s; a status symbol among Gamorreans as they demonstrated the strength and endurance of the host. Ugmush used a [[transliterator]] to overcome her inability to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], with the sultry voice of [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star [[Amber Jevanche]] translating her words.

In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Ugmush picked up the former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Callista Ming]] as part of her crew. After a period of six months, Ugmush and her crew returned to [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] during [[slushtime]]. There, they were caught up in a murder mystery, when her brother [[Guth]] was framed. Callista managed to sort out the mess, killing the [[Kheilwar]] that was actually responsible for the murder.

Some time later, while on [[Nim Drovis]], a [[Gopso'o]] rebellion took place and she fled the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on her [[Starship/Legends|starship]] with the famous [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] reporter [[Yarbolk Yemm]].

While traveling through the outlying [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|fields]] of the [[Drovian system]], they were intercepted by the [[Quarantine Enforcement Cruiser]] ''[[Lycoming]]'' which detained them.
